query:
SELECT 
  season,
  viewName,
  fetchedAt,
  JSON_LENGTH(payload, '$.transactions') as tx_count,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[0].type')) as first_tx_type,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[0].status')) as first_tx_status,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[1].type')) as second_tx_type,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[1].status')) as second_tx_status,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[2].type')) as third_tx_type,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[2].status')) as third_tx_status
FROM espn_season_cache
WHERE season = 2026
ORDER BY fetchedAt DESC
LIMIT 3;

  JSON_LENGTH(payload, '$.transactions') as tx_count,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[0].type')) as first_tx_type,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[0].status')) as first_tx_status,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[1].type')) as second_tx_type,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[1].status')) as second_tx_status,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[2].type')) as third_tx_type,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.transactions[2].status')) as third_tx_status
FROM espn_season_cache
WHERE season = 2026
ORDER BY fetchedAt DESC
LIMIT 3;
